_readme: CANONICAL source-candidate intake for the Georgism wiki (established 2026-07-17, Floyd).
Agents adding research candidates: APPEND to the 'queue' array and COMMIT+PUSH this file
to the repo (branch or main, like Hugh Bot's sources/slack-research-candidates.json).
Do NOT write to /workspace/wiki-queue.json or any container-local path - those are
ephemeral, invisible to other sessions, and lost on container recycle.
Item schema (same as the Slack candidates file): {url, source, author, date, context, topics}.
'source' = where it was found (slack channel, agent name, manual, etc.).
Triage sessions consume from here, record verdicts in a dated triage file (see
sources/slack-research-triage-2026-07-14.json for the pattern), and mark items
consumed by moving them to the 'consumed' array with a verdict.

consumed.notes: Triage + full scan completed (text extraction plus PDF figure/table review for chart data pdftotext dropped). "From the Ground Up: An Analysis of Land Value Tax in Cincinnati, Ohio" (Notre Dame Student Policy Network, in partnership with the Center for Land Economics, 15 July 2026) — a revenue-neutral 4:1 split-rate LVT parcel simulation for Cincinnati, OH, occasioned by Ohio SJR 7. Graded tier: supplementary (undergraduate student report with an advocacy-institute partner, not peer-reviewed; third in the SPN/CLE parcel-simulation series after South Bend and Princeton). Created research/ndspn-cincinnati-lvt-analysis.md; wired one-line mention into organizations/center-for-land-economics.md and cross-linked research/miller-hoskins-college-town-lvt.md, research/oates-schwab-pittsburgh.md, places/pittsburgh.md, places/pennsylvania.md, places/new-south-wales.md, places/australia.md. Not added to benefits/split-rate-increases-construction.md's supported_by (prospective simulation, not new independent evidence, per the delta rule and the precedent set by the sibling South Bend/Princeton reports). No places/cincinnati.md page created (does not clear the ≥2-inbound-link accept bar on its own). registry.csv row added.
